task_completion.description: Verify the 'Product Categories' taxonomy vocabulary was created
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for 'Product Categories' in the Drupal Taxonomy vocabulary list (usually under Structure > Taxonomy). The machine name 'product_categories' might also be visible.

task_completion.description: Verify the four required terms were added to the vocabulary
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for a list of terms under the 'Product Categories' vocabulary containing exactly or including: 'Audio & Headphones', 'Computer Peripherals', 'Smart Home', and 'Cameras & Photography'.

task_completion.description: Verify the 'Category' entity reference field was added to the 'Default' Product type
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the 'Manage fields' page for the 'Default' Product type (Commerce > Configuration > Products > Product types > Default). There should be a row with Label 'Category', Machine name 'field_category', and Field type 'Entity reference' (or similar reference type pointing to taxonomy terms).

task_completion.description: Verify the Sony headphones are categorized correctly
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the product edit form or product view page for 'Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones'. The 'Category' field should have 'Audio & Headphones' selected or displayed.

task_completion.description: Verify the Logitech mouse is categorized correctly
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look at the product edit form or product view page for 'Logitech MX Master 3S Wireless Mouse'. The 'Category' field should have 'Computer Peripherals' selected or displayed.

integrity.description: Verify the agent used the web GUI to complete the task
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots should show a web browser navigating the Drupal administrative interface (e.g., Claro theme), not just terminal commands or API scripts.

integrity.description: Verify browser developer tools were not used to fake the UI
integrity.visual_evidence: The browser's 'Inspect Element' or developer console should not be open and modifying the DOM to fake the presence of fields or terms.

integrity.description: Verify the results are shown within the actual Drupal application
integrity.visual_evidence: The taxonomy, field management, and product edit pages must match standard Drupal Commerce layouts, rather than being typed into a text editor or a static HTML mock.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Vocabulary to look for: 'Product Categories' (machine name: product_categories). Field to look for on the Default Product type: 'Category' (machine name: field_category). Expected terms: 'Audio & Headphones', 'Computer Peripherals', 'Smart Home', 'Cameras & Photography'. Product assignments: 'Sony WH-1000XM5 Wireless Headphones' must be assigned to 'Audio & Headphones', and 'Logitech MX Master 3S Wireless Mouse' must be assigned to 'Computer Peripherals'.
